Repository: Homebrew/brew
Release: 5.0.2
Tag: 5.0.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-11-17T08:58:23Z; created_at: 2025-11-16T17:42:06Z
Release notes:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at main -->
## What's Changed
* dev-cmd/lgtm: add `--online` flag by @botantony in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21036
* Allow environment variable WSL_DISTRO_NAME. by @pcastellazzi in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21047
* Replace sdk_path_if_needed with sdk_path by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21044
* build: skip libexec metafiles if prefix already has some by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21045
* dev-cmd/generate-formula-api: add dependencies to internal API. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21042
* os/mac/pkgconfig: remove old fuse pkg-config files by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21051
* bump-formula-pr: `--write-only` flag should skip PR checks by @botantony in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21053
* Portable Ruby 3.4.7 by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21052
* Recommend MacPorts for older macOS versions. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21054
* dev-cmd/bump: run bump once per synced group by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21056
* tap_auditor: audit synced_versions_formulae.json by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21057
* utils/gems: run `setup_gem_environment!` by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21059
* `HOMEBREW_NO_INSTALL_FROM_API` disables `HOMEBREW_USE_INTERNAL_API` by @Rylan12 in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21060
* Add `brew --taps` command by @p-linnane in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21058
* gems: remove arm-linux from Gemfile.lock. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21064
* dev-cmd/vendor-gems: fix permissions for Linux GitHub Actions. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21065
* Use GitHub Actions helper method more consistently. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21066
* CONTRIBUTING: note Homebrew/discussions. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21068
* Add profiling to `brew tests` by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21069
* Update ruby_URLs when using HOMEBREW_ARTIFACT_DOMAIN by @anugrahsinghal in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21075
* Bump the "all" group with 3 updates across multiple ecosystems by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21062
* github_runner_matrix: check requirement on simulated system by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21074
* upgrade: tweak linkage handling. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21063
* dev-cmd/contributions: Quarters are our most common unit of time by @issyl0 in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21023
* dev-cmd/contributions: Space between  `--quarter` docs sentences by @issyl0 in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21080
* Prevent users from uninstalling casks with dependents by @botantony in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21078
* Fix `rubocop` in vscode and simplify `brew install-bundler-gems` calls by @Rylan12 in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21083
* formulary: leave default `ignore_errors=false` for internal API load by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21086
* Remove `pypi_formula_mappings.json` code by @p-linnane in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21081
* workflows/tests: tweak behaviour. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21091
## New Contributors
* @pcastellazzi made their first contribution in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21047
* @anugrahsinghal made their first contribution in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21075
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/compare/5.0.1...5.0.2
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Homebrew/brew release 5.0.2, the project adds a `--online` flag to `dev-cmd/lgtm`, allows the `WSL_DISTRO_NAME` environment variable, replaces `sdk_path_if_needed` with `sdk_path`, skips libexec metafiles if the prefix already has some, adds dependencies to the internal API in `dev-cmd/generate-formula-api`, removes old fuse pkg-config files on macOS, makes `bump-formula-pr --write-only` skip PR checks, updates Portable Ruby to 3.4.7, recommends MacPorts for older macOS versions, runs bump once per synced group in `dev-cmd/bump`, audits `synced_versions_formulae.json` in `tap_auditor`, runs `setup_gem_environment!` in `utils/gems`, makes `HOMEBREW_NO_INSTALL_FROM_API` disable `HOMEBREW_USE_INTERNAL_API`, adds `brew --taps` command, removes arm-linux from Gemfile.lock, fixes permissions for Linux GitHub Actions in `dev-cmd/vendor-gems`, uses GitHub Actions helper method more consistently, notes Homebrew/discussions in CONTRIBUTING, adds profiling to `brew tests`, updates ruby_URLs when using `HOMEBREW_ARTIFACT_DOMAIN`, bumps dependencies, checks requirement on simulated system in `github_runner_matrix`, tweaks linkage handling in `upgrade`, changes quarters to be the most common unit of time in `dev-cmd/contributions`, fixes spacing in `--quarter` docs, prevents users from uninstalling casks with dependents, fixes rubocop in vscode and simplifies `brew install-bundler-gems` calls, leaves default `ignore_errors=false` for internal API load in `formulary`, removes `pypi_formula_mappings.json` code, and tweaks workflows/tests behaviour.

* Add Nice option to service by @devnoname120 in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21088
* tap_auditor: add comprehensive validation for formula and cask renames by @loganrosen in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21011
* bundle/commands/install_spec: fix flaky test. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21104
* hardware: add `arm64?` by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21107
* github_runner_matrix: enable arm64 linux dep tests when not self-hosted by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21108
* utils/pypi: retain patches in update_python_resources by @bevanjkay in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21105
* Add ThrottleInterval option to service (macOS) by @devnoname120 in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21095
* audit_min_os: respect arch for universal apps by @samford in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21110
* Remove portable ruby bin from PATH by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21111
* shims: move rustc_wrapper from super to shared by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21114
* download_queue: fail on checksum mismatch by @botantony in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21113
## New Contributors
* @BoolPurist made their first contribution in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21099
* @XXXXRT666 made their first contribution in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21103
* @devnoname120 made their first contribution in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21088
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/compare/5.0.2...5.0.3
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Homebrew/brew release 5.0.3, the project disables the internal API in `env_config`, updates the example for listing taps with a note about fresh installs, uses a simpler check for performance in `cmd/which-formula`, adds the test_prof plugin to rubocop.yml, corrects links for brew mirrors, adds a Nice option to service, adds comprehensive validation for formula and cask renames in `tap_auditor`, fixes a flaky test in `bundle/commands/install_spec`, adds `arm64?` to hardware, enables arm64 linux dep tests when not self-hosted in `github_runner_matrix`, retains patches in `update_python_resources` in `utils/pypi`, adds a ThrottleInterval option to service on macOS, respects arch for universal apps in `audit_min_os`, removes portable ruby bin from PATH, moves rustc_wrapper from super to shared in shims, and fails on checksum mismatch in `download_queue`.

* system_config: `typed: strict` by @botantony in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21124
* extend/os/mac/system_config: check for Metal Toolchain by @p-linnane in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21117
* test_bot: remove `session-manager-plugin` by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21127
* item: do not remove `lib` formulae/casks by @botantony in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21126
* Bump the "all" group with 2 updates across multiple ecosystems by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21120
* test/commands_spec: write files to tmpdir by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21128
* `brew uninstall` respects the `HOMEBREW_NO_INSTALL_FROM_API` env var by @wheelerlaw in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21133
* Update type signature for `==` by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21135
* feat: add flatpak support to brewfile by @ahmedadan in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21097
* outdated: respect `HOMEBREW_UPGRADE_GREEDY_CASKS` variable by @botantony in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21138
* cmd/bundle: add --no-secrets switch. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21137
* std_npm_args: ignore scripts optionally, by default. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21136
* Bump the "all" group with 2 updates across multiple ecosystems by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21141
* Only use MachOShim/ELFShim when required by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21071
* linkage_checker: fix linkage detection by @carlocab in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21151
* formula_versions: `typed: strict` by @cho-m in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21148
* array_alphabetization: update to check `conflicts_with` methods by @krehel in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21152
* docs/Brew-Bundle-and-Brewfile: document Flatpak support by @botantony in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21153
* linux/cask/artifact/relocated: fix type error. by @MikeMcQuaid in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21154
## New Contributors
* @ahmedadan made their first contribution in https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/pull/21097
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Homebrew/brew/compare/5.0.3...5.0.4
